nodes.name: 📥 Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: URL to paste in session settings: copy from n8n after activating

nodes.name: ✅ Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge immediately so the server does not retry the request.

nodes.name: 🔍 Extract Message Fields
nodes.notes: Normalises the payload and maps wppconnect types to clean categories.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Message Type
nodes.notes: Routes to the correct handler — text/image/video/audio/document/sticker/location.

nodes.name: 💬 Handle Text
nodes.notes: Keyword replies + Echo mode: send 'صدى <text>' or 'echo <text>' to test the bot.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Handle Image
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'image' and set replyImageUrl to reply with an image.

nodes.name: 🎬 Handle Video
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'video' and set replyVideoUrl to reply with a video.

nodes.name: 🎵 Handle Audio / Voice
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'audio' and set replyAudioUrl to reply with audio.

nodes.name: 📄 Handle Document
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'document' and set replyFileUrl + replyFileName to reply with a file.

nodes.name: 🎯 Handle Sticker
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'sticker' and set replyImageUrl to reply with a sticker.

nodes.name: 📍 Handle Location
nodes.notes: Change replyType to 'location' and set replyLat, replyLng, replyLocationDesc to reply with a location.

nodes.name: ⏱️ Wait 2 Seconds
nodes.notes: 2-second delay to avoid being flagged as a bot by WhatsApp.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Reply Type
nodes.notes: Routes to sender node based on replyType: text/image/video/audio/document/sticker/location.

nodes.name: 📤 Send Text Reply
nodes.notes: Sends a text reply. Credential: HTTP Header Auth — Name: X-API-Key, Value: your API key.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Send Image Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyImageUrl (public URL) and optionally replyCaption in the handler.

nodes.name: 🎬 Send Video Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyVideoUrl (public MP4 URL) and optionally replyCaption in the handler.

nodes.name: 🎵 Send Audio Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyAudioUrl (public MP3/OGG URL) in the handler.

nodes.name: 📄 Send Document Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyFileUrl, replyFileName, and optionally replyCaption in the handler.

nodes.name: 🎯 Send Sticker Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyImageUrl to a public PNG/JPG/WebP — it is converted to a sticker automatically.

nodes.name: 📍 Send Location Reply
nodes.notes: Set replyLat, replyLng, and optionally replyLocationDesc in the handler.

nodes.name: ⚠️ Log Send Error
nodes.notes: Catches HTTP errors from all send nodes. Logs status + body for debugging.
